repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
full_text_tesim: Not foliated; sequence follows Brock, 1995, pl. 436-437
Bifolio; five evenly spaced horizontal creases running across bifolio
Fol. 2v has the beginnings of an index of lections in CPA
Ff. 1v and 2r contain some notes in Arabic, including a date (AM 6760 = AD 1252)
Two six-pointed stars with dots, in red and black ink, on f. 2r
